response:
Section 1  
-Tesla is on the brink of collapse -we are facing a crisis that cannot be ignored -the market is reacting negatively -the board is under pressure -we must act quickly

Section 2  
-We are taking urgent steps to stabilize the company -we are working on solutions -the financial situation is critical -we need to secure funding -the future of Tesla depends on our actions

Section 3  
-We are prioritizing the most important projects -we are focusing on innovation -we are ensuring the continued growth of the company -we are making tough decisions -the road ahead is challenging

Section 4  
-We are committed to delivering quality products -we are staying ahead of the competition -we are building a stronger future -we are not giving up -we are fighting for our company

Section 5  
-We are confident in our ability to recover -we are determined to succeed -we are working tirelessly -we are not afraid of the challenges -we are ready to face whatever comes next
